name: Praia Table Lamp - 24.75 Inch Height - TBL4588 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the elegant Praia table lamp, standing at 24.75 inches. This black resin lamp seamlessly combines modern aesthetics with a classic touch. Its sleek design features a sturdy resin body and a fabric shade, creating a subtle yet striking contrast. Whether placed on a bedside table or an office desk, it enhances any setting with warmth and style. The Praia lamp is not just a lighting solution; it is a statement piece that complements your decor beautifully. Let this lamp be the perfect addition to your home, offering both function and charm in its design.
